## Week in Review: 2026-04-20 to 2026-04-26

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 7.9.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.9 (+11.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.08)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.7 (-5.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.24)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.7 (+33.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.33)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 7.9 (-8.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.19)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
